testcase.name: handleGenericException_returns500
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-11T22:23:29.935-03:00 ERROR 2528 --- [ticket-service] [ main] c.t.t.s.i.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unexpected error on request to /api/v1/tickets/TKT-001: Unexpected database failure
